brief: This memory links grandmother, the kitchen, and holiday dinner from 1998. The interesting part of the demo is how one memory becomes easier to retrieve once many related moments exist together.
whyItMatters: The atlas starts to feel real when a search can surface connected memories instead of returning a single note.
searchIntro: Search across many seeded memories to see recurring places, people, and events connect into an atlas.

brief: This memory links uncle ray, the kitchen, and market morning from 2017. The interesting part of the demo is how one memory becomes easier to retrieve once many related moments exist together.
